title: DeveloperApp
description: A developer app that is associated with a developer.

appId.description: Output only. ID of the developer app.

developerId.description: Output only. Developer ID of the owning developer.

apiProducts.description: List of API products associated with the app.

attributes.description: Custom attributes for the developer app.

callbackUrl.description: Callback URL used by OAuth 2.0 authorization servers.

credentials.description: Output only. Credentials (API keys) for the app.

status.description: Status of the developer app (approved or revoked).

scopes.description: OAuth scopes associated with the app.

createdAt.description: Output only. Time the app was created in milliseconds since epoch.

lastModifiedAt.description: Output only. Time the app was last modified.
